headline: Forwarder verification control and SPaT tooling updates (1.0.6)

changelog.title: Forwarder verification control and SPaT tooling updates
notes: Added new SCM SPaT source configurator tooling and controller database templates.
Added conflict-mapping and validation support for the SCM SPaT workflow.
Updated the forwarders page with a force verification option and refreshed layout.

changelog.title: New SPaT source automation mechanism added to SCM config
notes: Added a new SPaT source automation workflow inside the SCM configurator for loading controller inputs, reviewing signal groups, and posting verified SPaT source mappings.
Improved IntelliLight and Econolite controller-database handling for active phase detection, permissive movement recognition, and overlap-driven strategy mapping.
Refined SPaT workspace validation, upload behavior, async action handling, and operator review flow so changes must be confirmed before post and verify.

changelog.title: Windows SNMP support included in the app
notes: Added built-in Windows SNMP support for SCM workflows.
Removed the need to install SNMP tools separately on Windows machines.
Fixed SCM SNMP checks in packaged Windows builds.

changelog.title: SCMS health and serial handling updates
notes: Updated device health checks to use both enrollment identifiers when fetching SCMS data.
Fixed serial number enforcement and the agent toggle notification behavior.
Refined SCMS tag updates to include the Commsignia serial number format.

changelog.title: SCMS tag and forward-table fixes
notes: Fixed SCMS tag to show SignalID instead of ITSid.
Fixed the forwarder table not assigning the SCM IP to the first two entries for BSM and SRM.
Slight UI changes to the config panel.

changelog.title: Sidebar changelog and update controls
notes: Moved changelog and update actions into the shared left sidebar so they are available from every module.
Kept release metadata in a canonical catalog with semantic-version comparison and manifest generation.
Version bump now updates project metadata and lockfile entries from the same release command.

changelog.title: Initial packaged release
notes: Shipped the unified NiceGUI workspace for RSU, OBU, SCMS, TIM, and UTA tooling.
Added versioned Windows packaging so field builds can be tracked by release number.
Introduced in-app release history and update-check plumbing for future executable rollouts.
